title: My Gem Mod
description: My first mod. it adds red gems into the game that spawn only and rarely in the end. Also adds Amethyst tools, armor, and spear
body:
# My Gem Mod!

![github](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/github_64h.png)
![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_64h.png)
![modrinth-gallery](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/documentation/modrinth-gallery_64h.png)
![fabric](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_64h.png)
![quilt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/quilt_64h.png)

## ⚠ Be Aware
The gallery may contain spoilers.

---
# Added New Spears!
Adds the **new vanilla spear** (Minecraft 1.21.11 only) to both toolsets, introducing a different combat style with **extended reach, charging attacks, and jabbing mechanics**.

Spears provide an alternative to swords and deal **velocity-based damage** (similar to the mace, but usable both horizontally and vertically). 

More about vanilla spears: https://minecraft.wiki/w/Spear
_______
# About

### **Discover the Rare Red Gem in the End and Forge Magical Amethyst Gear!**
My Gem Mod adds a new late-game End material alongside vanilla-style magical gear.  
Discover **Red Gems**, an extremely rare End ore used to craft powerful tools and armor, and experiment with **Amethyst equipment** featuring magical abilities and meaningful trade-offs.

Made to feel vanilla-friendly and suitable for End-focused modpacks.

---

## About the Red Gem
The Red Gem is an extremely rare ore found in the End islands (1 vein per 4 chunks).  
It is comparable to Netherite and balanced by its extreme rarity and End-only progression.  
Red Gem gear also features very low cooldowns, making it powerful but its generation makes it very late-game.

### TL;DR
- Spawns extremely rarely in the End (1 vein per 4 chunks)
- Comparable to Netherite, balanced by rarity and progression
- Very low cooldowns
- Includes tools, armor, and spears (velocity-based damage)
- Intended for late-game and long-term worlds

---

## About the Amethyst Additions
Amethyst tools and armor provide magical abilities (work-in-progress). While powerful, they are balanced by very low durability.

### TL;DR
- Magical abilities (WIP)
- No cooldowns applied yet
- Includes tools, armor, and spears (velocity-based damage)
- **Very low durability**

---

## Why This Gem Mod?
This mod adds a small, vanilla-style End ore designed to extend progression and add more grinding.  
Its rarity encourages longer playthroughs and makes it a great fit for End-focused modpacks or players looking for extended late-game goals.

---

## Amethyst Sword Ability
- Poisons enemies on hit

More Amethyst tool abilities coming soon™

---

## Credits
You may use this mod in your modpack without permission or credit (though credit is appreciated).

# Feedback is always wanted
my Discord is zayoon0o0
